name: Build My Brainrot
author: Poki
description: Build My Brainrot is an idle game where you gather blocks to build funny brainrot characters! Chop trees, collect the right colors and amounts, and piece together your favorite internet icons. Unlock new characters to earn gems, then use them to upgrade your building skills and craft even faster. Can you build them all and master the brainrot factory? How to play Build My Brainrot? Use WASD, arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Build My Brainrot? Build My Brainrot is created by Zupga. Play their other games on Poki: Chest Warriors , Cat Room Blast and Build Land ! How can I play Build My Brainrot for free? You can play Build My Brainrot for free on Poki. Can I play Build My Brainrot on mobile devices and desktop? Build My Brainrot can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
